title: ARGENTUM Reputation Dispute — False Attestation
description: An attestor signed off on an ARGENTUM action that did not occur or was misrepresented. Jurors are asked to review the attestation record and supporting evidence.
question: Should the disputed attestation be slashed (ruling 1) or cleared (ruling 2)?

descriptions: The dispute is invalid, out of scope, or lacks sufficient information. No karma is slashed and the attestation remains.
The attestor loses 5 karma; the attestation is invalidated and the action weight is recomputed. If the action drops below threshold, the poster's karma is also revoked.
The attestation is upheld. The reporter loses their bond.

evidence_expected: The original action record (action_id, poster, timestamp, proof URL)
The attestation record (attester agentId, signature, timestamp)
Proof that the action did not happen as described, or that the attestor could not have verified it
